untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of agricultural commodity type (corn/soybeans/wheat) — not available in price/technical indicators; (2) calendar-based seasonal period detection (Jun-Aug) — no date/calendar indicator in allowed set; (3) comparison to 'historical seasonal average' — requires multi-year seasonal normalization not expressible with available indicators; (4) explicit 'implied volatility' of options contracts — not available (only historical volatility hvol_20 exists). This is a fundamentally option-pricing and calendar-aware rule that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: hvol_20 for 'implied volatility' (imperfect), sma_20 for trend context. However, the core logic—seasonal calendar detection and commodity identification—lies outside the indicator universe. Recommend: add calendar_month, commodity_type, and implied_vol indicators to backtest engine, or handle this rule in a separate pre-processing layer.
